name: core--gitignore-structure
description: Fix .gitignore to properly exclude vendor/ and track Gemfile.lock

changes: Move vendor/ to separate line (currently on same line as terraform.tfvars negation)
Remove /Gemfile.lock from ignore list (should be tracked for reproducibility)
Verify vendor/ has proper syntax (newline separator)

checks: No syntax errors in .gitignore (each pattern on own line)
git check-ignore Gemfile.lock returns nothing (not ignored)
